response.overview: Hannah is an entrepreneur who runs a decoration shop. She has received an unwanted surprise. Upon waking up from sleep one day, Hannah found herself lying on a bed in her cousin Maira's house, next to a man she did not recognize. This incident has changed Hannah's life. In fact, the girl has also been cast out by her family. Hannah decides to flee far away from everyone. However, fate has decreed the appearance of the strange man again after several years later. Luth Mikail, a Chief Executive Officer of a construction company, returns and demands forgiveness and a relationship with Hannah. There are 1001 possibilities how someone would react when faced with such an incident. Hannah's reaction when the dark episode in her life haunts her again reveals a meaningful perspective.
response.title: Ku Akad Kau Dengan Bismillah
